title: carex sempervirens subsp. firma
intro: Carex sempervirens subsp. firma, also known as the Coastal Sedge or Evergreen Sedge, is a perennial sedge plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Carex sempervirens subsp. firma include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a variety of ways to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
